title: LSML 1.0 — cron adapter
description: Scheduled trigger. At each cron firing, emits a fixed payload merged into `writes_to`. Useful for periodic state nudges (clear ephemeral flags, reset counters, etc.).

schedule.description: Cron expression (5 fields, POSIX). E.g. `*/15 * * * *` for every 15 minutes.

payload.description: Patch object emitted at each firing. Keys are LeafPaths under `writes_to`, values are the leaf values. Static — same payload every time.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name. The cron schedule is interpreted in this timezone.
